evidence_item: Structured supplementary NET proteome table (752 proteins: 272 HC + 480 RA/SLE)
protein_or_feature: gene+UniProt accession; peptide counts; Anova p; q value; max fold change
histones; MPO; neutrophil elastase; dsDNA-associated proteins
allowed_claim: protein composition of released NET material
prohibited_claim: NET formation rate, clearance, or pathogenicity

evidence_item: Quantitative NET proteome compared across HC/RA/SLE
protein_or_feature: NET-associated protein set (full list in article/supplement)
reported_metric_or_status: see Front Immunol 2019 tables (supplement not yet parsed)
allowed_claim: reported NET protein composition differences across groups
prohibited_claim: conversion of proteome to NETosis rate or clearance
a processed NET protein matrix is in the repository

evidence_item: Quantitative proteomics identified and measured NET proteins from healthy, RA and SLE neutrophils; NETs carry histones, MPO and elastase
protein_or_feature: histones; MPO; neutrophil elastase; citrullinated peptides (RA); nuclear neoepitopes (SLE)
context: rheumatoid arthritis and systemic lupus erythematosus vs healthy control
allowed_claim: reported NET protein composition differences across HC/RA/SLE
prohibited_claim: NETosis rate / clearance / pathogenicity / executed function
